_comment: Data dictionary: expert-provided meaning of each column. Describes attribute SEMANTICS only (meaning/nature) -- never ERD roles (no 'primary key', no 'foreign key to X'). Keyed by the canonical column name in CSV order; build_prompts.py rewrites the key to match the header transform (meaningful/cryptic/none) so the dictionary is usable in every header condition and can recover semantics that coded/absent names lose.

dictionary.passport: a code identifying an individual passenger
dictionary.customer_name: the given name of the passenger
dictionary.customer_surname: the family name of the passenger
dictionary.flight_number: a code identifying a scheduled flight
dictionary.flight_date: the calendar date on which the flight operates
dictionary.seat_number: the seat a passenger occupies on a flight
dictionary.airline_code: a short code for the airline operating the flight
dictionary.airport_departure: a code for the airport the flight departs from
dictionary.departure_name: the name of the departure airport
dictionary.departure_location: a code for the geographic location of the departure airport
dictionary.departure_city: the city of the departure airport's location
dictionary.airport_arrival: a code for the airport the flight arrives at
dictionary.arrival_name: the name of the arrival airport
dictionary.arrival_location: a code for the geographic location of the arrival airport
dictionary.arrival_city: the city of the arrival airport's location
dictionary.belt_number: a code for the baggage belt used at the arrival airport
dictionary.license_number: the registration code of the physical airplane used for the flight
dictionary.status_code: a short code for an operational status of the flight
dictionary.status: the human-readable label of that status
dictionary.status_date: the date on which the flight reached that status
dictionary.status_hour: the time at which the flight reached that status
dictionary.crew_license: a code identifying a crew member
dictionary.crew_role: the role the crew member performs on the flight
